channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Watch: JD Vance Chest Bumps Air Force Cadet At Graduation Ceremony, Then A 'Note To Self'

media:content.media:description: Some X users described JD Vance in "bro-mode" at the ceremony.

item.description: After his speech, US Vice President JD Vance greeted members of the graduating class when one cadet surprised him with a playful chest bump.
item.content:encoded: After his speech, US Vice President JD Vance greeted members of the graduating class when one cadet surprised him with a playful chest bump.

item.title: With Oman Warning, Trump Has Now Threatened To Blow Up 1 Out Of Every 13 Countries

media:content.media:description: Not all strikes and threats are of the same nature.

item.description: Trump warned that the US could strike Oman if it tries to take control of the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: Trump warned that the US could strike Oman if it tries to take control of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Mount Everest 2026 Sees Record Rush, Over 1000 Climbers Summit Before Closure

media:content.media:description: Mountaineers climbing a slope lined up during their ascent to summit Mount Everest in Nepal.

item.description: The world's highest peak, which straddles the Nepal-China border, can be scaled from either Nepal or the northern face in Tibet. But China closed its route this year.
item.content:encoded: The world's highest peak, which straddles the Nepal-China border, can be scaled from either Nepal or the northern face in Tibet. But China closed its route this year.

item.title: Ebola Returns To A Broken Congo, This Time With Virus Science Isn't Ready For

media:content.media:description: Yet even as Ebola spreads, Congo's health crisis continues unabated.

item.description: This is where the Democratic Republic of Congo's latest Ebola outbreak has erupted in the middle of a grinding conflict that has hollowed out public services and displaced millions.
item.content:encoded: This is where the Democratic Republic of Congo's latest Ebola outbreak has erupted in the middle of a grinding conflict that has hollowed out public services and displaced millions.

item.title: Trump Claims Obama, Biden Spent Millions On Reflecting Pool. They Didn't

media:content.media:description: Workers continue to paint the bottom of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool on the National Mall

item.description: Donald Trump had criticised his predecessors' efforts to fix the site at a Cabinet meeting on Wednesday, claiming they spent "hundreds of millions of dollars."
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump had criticised his predecessors' efforts to fix the site at a Cabinet meeting on Wednesday, claiming they spent "hundreds of millions of dollars."

item.title: "She Refused To Pay Drug Dealer": Father Of Indian Student Stabbed In Canada

media:content.media:description: Vidhi, a resident of Borsad in Gujarat, had moved to Canada four years ago.

item.description: Vidhi Megha, an Indian student, was killed on May 15 in St Catharines in Canada, but her family was informed over 10 days later.
item.content:encoded: Vidhi Megha, an Indian student, was killed on May 15 in St Catharines in Canada, but her family was informed over 10 days later.

item.title: 22-Year-Old Student From Gujarat Stabbed To Death In Canada

media:content.media:description: Vidhi Kalpeshbhai Meghani was stabbed earlier this month

item.description: The victim has been identified as Vidhi Kalpeshbhai Meghani, a resident of Borsad in the Anand district of Gujarat.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1105768/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The victim has been identified as Vidhi Kalpeshbhai Meghani, a resident of Borsad in the Anand district of Gujarat.

item.title: $300 Billion Investment, Lebanon Solution: Inside 'Almost There' US-Iran Deal

media:content.media:description: US and Iran have reportedly agreed to set up a $300 billion redevelopment fund for Iran.

item.description: The two sides are close to the deal, yet lingering vagaries remain. As the majority of the talks have taken place through the Pakistani and Qatari mediators, it is reportedly not clear whether the Americans and the Iranians have been working on the s
item.content:encoded: The two sides are close to the deal, yet lingering vagaries remain. As the majority of the talks have taken place through the Pakistani and Qatari mediators, it is reportedly not clear whether the Americans and the Iranians have been working on the s

item.title: On Camera, Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin's New Glenn Rocket Explodes During Test

media:content.media:description: Video from the incident shows smoke emerging from beneath the rocket before it fully combusts

item.description: Florida congressman Mike Haridopolos, whose district includes Cape Canaveral, said in a statement on X that he has been in contact with NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman regarding the explosion.
item.content:encoded: Florida congressman Mike Haridopolos, whose district includes Cape Canaveral, said in a statement on X that he has been in contact with NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman regarding the explosion.

item.title: Aspiring MMA Fighter From Kerala Killed In Rare Bear Attack In Canada

media:content.media:description: Rare bear attack kills Kerala MMA fighter Hrishikesh Koloth working in Saskatchewan.

item.description: Aspiring MMA fighter from Kerala, Hrishikesh Koloth, dies in a rare bear attack at a uranium site in Saskatchewan, Canada.
item.content:encoded: Aspiring MMA fighter from Kerala, Hrishikesh Koloth, dies in a rare bear attack at a uranium site in Saskatchewan, Canada.

item.title: "We Face Delegitimisation In World, But Not In India": Benjamin Netanyahu

media:content.media:description: Benjamin Netanyahu termed his last visit to India in 2018 a "love fest."

item.description: Benjamin Netanyahu claimed Israel has "more followers from India than anywhere else."
item.content:encoded: Benjamin Netanyahu claimed Israel has "more followers from India than anywhere else."

item.title: 8% Of US Lacked Health Insurance In 2025, It May Get Worse: Report

media:content.media:description: The Trump administration has sought to expand access to low-premium catastrophic health insurance plans.

item.description: Massive changes to Medicaid passed into law last year could result in 10 million more uninsured individuals over a decade.
item.content:encoded: Massive changes to Medicaid passed into law last year could result in 10 million more uninsured individuals over a decade.

item.title: Trump On US Currency? He May Feature On $250 Bill, Plan Under Consideration

media:content.media:description: A design mock-up showed the words "America 250 anniversary"

item.description: "Right now there is proposed legislation to change the first requirement so that a living person, Donald Trump, could be on a $250 bill," US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said
item.content:encoded: "Right now there is proposed legislation to change the first requirement so that a living person, Donald Trump, could be on a $250 bill," US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said

item.title: "Won't Tolerate": US Threatens To Sanction Ally Oman Over Hormuz Tolls

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump appeared to threaten Oman over a proposed short-term Hormuz control deal with Iran

item.description: He said the United States would "not tolerate any effort to impose a tolling system in the Strait of Hormuz," a reference to Iranian proposals to do so as part of a potential agreement with Washington.
item.content:encoded: He said the United States would "not tolerate any effort to impose a tolling system in the Strait of Hormuz," a reference to Iranian proposals to do so as part of a potential agreement with Washington.

item.title: US Denies Aircraft Destroyed In Iran's Bushehr Province

media:content.media:description: The US has denied the report and said that no American aircraft was shot down.

item.description: Iran's state TV said on early on Friday that a US aircraft was destroyed in Iran's Jam governorate in Bushehr.
item.content:encoded: Iran's state TV said on early on Friday that a US aircraft was destroyed in Iran's Jam governorate in Bushehr.

item.title: Iran War LIVE Updates: US, Iran Trade Strikes After Trump's 'Negotiating On Fumes' Warning
item.description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz
item.content:encoded: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz

item.title: US-Iran Ceasefire Highlights: "Will Knock Them Out A Lot Harder": Trump Threatens More Iran Strikes
item.description: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: The attacks shattered a period of relative calm in the Middle East since the ceasefire took effect on April 8.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: The attacks shattered a period of relative calm in the Middle East since the ceasefire took effect on April 8.

item.title: US Iran War Highlights: Hormuz May Reopen 30 Days After Iran, US Strike Peace Deal
item.description: US Iran War Live Updates: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf said Iran's armed forces had rebuilt their capabilities during the ceasefire.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War Live Updates: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf said Iran's armed forces had rebuilt their capabilities during the ceasefire.

item.title: Israel, Russia Added To UN Blacklist On Sexual Violence In Conflicts

media:content.media:description: In 2025, patterns of sexual violence against Palestinians detained in Israel, the report said.

item.description: Israel and Russia are now included in the "list of parties credibly suspected of committing or being responsible for patterns of rape or other forms of sexual violence" in armed conflict on the agenda of the Security Council.
item.content:encoded: Israel and Russia are now included in the "list of parties credibly suspected of committing or being responsible for patterns of rape or other forms of sexual violence" in armed conflict on the agenda of the Security Council.

item.title: US Declares 2 Brazilian Drug Groups As Terrorist Organisations

media:content.media:description: Rubio said that CV and PCC are two of the most violent criminal organizations in Brazil.

item.description: The US State Department announced it will designate two Brazilian criminal groups as foreign terrorist organizations on Thursday.
item.content:encoded: The US State Department announced it will designate two Brazilian criminal groups as foreign terrorist organizations on Thursday.
